name: GIGABYTE B860M GAMING X WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9200(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB4 Type-C with DP-Alt - DisplayPort 2.1 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE B860M GAMING X WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA
description: Gaming-focused micro-ATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 with DDR5 support, PCIe 5.0, and Wi-Fi 6E.
